title: Junior Investment Banker at Deloitte India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Deloitte India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Deloitte India Digital Technologies in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Deloitte India Digital Technologies:
Deloitte India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India Digital Technologies!
